news.headline: They pay 30% less for electricity. Their secret? Solar panels
news.summary: Residents in the town of Escourse, France, pay 30 percent less for their electricity bills than elsewhere in the country. Their secret? Renewable energy. Since 2011, the town has invested more than €1.2 million in solar panels. Homeowners, local businesses and associations now use solar-powered ener

news.headline: Pope to bless Barcelona's Sagrada Familia, world's tallest church
news.summary: Pope Leo XIV will bless the giant new tower of the famed Sagrada Familia Basilica in Barcelona on Wednesday and celebrate mass inside what is now the world's tallest church. The church is a still-unfinished modernist masterpiece by architect Antoni Gaudi that was visited by nearly five million peopl

news.headline: Pope Leo XIV's Sagrada Familia visit highlights Gaudí's enduring legacy
news.summary: "Lift up your eyes" is the motto of Pope Leo XIV's upcoming visit to Spain. It's an invitation to look up at the soaring towers of the Sagrada Família in Barcelona. The Pope's visit comes as the city marks the centenary of Antoni Gaudí's death and celebrates the completion of the basilica's central

news.headline: World Cup 2026: The Ghetto Kids dance troupe from Uganda to perform with Shakira
news.summary: Shakira will have some special guests performing with her at this year's World Cup half time show... The Ghetto Kids dance troupe from Uganda. The young performers, who are aged between 4 and 16, say they're looking forward to it. They'll be sharing the line up with BTS and Madonna.

news.headline: Further cases of violence emerge as Lyhanna's case puts French justice under pressure
news.summary: France’s justice minister has rejected calls to resign following public outrage over judicial failures linked to the killing of an 11-year-old girl.
